name: Southeastern Credit Services, LLC
description_short: Southeastern Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution offering checking, savings, loans, and credit cards with 26,000+ members across South Georgia.
description_long:
Southeastern Credit Union operates as a federally chartered credit union serving the South Georgia region, with a primary focus on personal and business financial services. The organization has built a membership base exceeding 26,000 members and maintains physical locations including a recently relocated Waycross branch at 1701-A Boulevard Square. As a credit union rather than a commercial bank, Southeastern is structured as a cooperative financial institution owned by its members.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of financial products across personal and business banking. On the deposit side, they provide multiple checking account tiers (Cash Rewards Checking, Cash Back Rewards Checking, Classic Checking), savings products (Share Savings, Money Market Accounts, Club Accounts, Share Certificates), and retirement accounts (IRAs). Their lending portfolio includes auto loans, recreational vehicle loans, personal loans, home mortgage loans (fixed-rate, ARM, USDA Rural, FHA, VA, and construction loans), home equity lines of credit, and commercial real estate financing. They also issue personal and business credit cards.

Southeastern Credit Union distinguishes itself through localized decision-making and processing, particularly in commercial real estate lending where they emphasize knowledge of the South Georgia market. Their staff includes named loan officers (Shawn, Judy Nelson) who are highlighted in member testimonials. The credit union offers digital banking tools including online banking, mobile deposit, digital wallet, and e-statements, allowing members to access services beyond branch hours. They position themselves as a member-focused institution with personalized service rather than a large impersonal bank.

As a credit union, Southeastern's structure provides potential advantages through member ownership and cooperative governance, though membership eligibility may be field-of-membership restricted. The website emphasizes customer testimonials and relationship-based service. However, typical credit union limitations apply: membership requirements may restrict access, hours may be more limited than large banks, and product availability may not match the broadest national lenders. Specific rates, fees, and membership eligibility requirements are not detailed on the homepage.
address: 3330 Cumberland Blvd SE Suite 500, Atlanta, GA 30339

company_info.headquarters: 3330 Cumberland Blvd SE Suite 500, Atlanta, GA 30339

pros: Credit union structure with 26,000+ members suggests established, stable institution with member-ownership benefits
Multiple mortgage program types available including USDA Rural, FHA, VA, and construction loans
Quick local decision-making and processing emphasized for commercial real estate and home loans
Digital banking suite includes online banking, mobile app, mobile deposit, and digital wallet
Named loan officers (Shawn, Judy Nelson) highlighted in testimonials, suggesting relationship-based service model
Same-day loan completion mentioned in member testimonial (auto loan processed same day)
Business banking products parallel personal offerings with business checking, loans, and credit cards
cons: Membership eligibility likely restricted by field-of-membership (typical credit union limitation not detailed on site)
No specific interest rates, APRs, or fee schedules visible on homepage—only links to view rates
Limited branch locations suggested by single mentioned location in Waycross, GA; geographic service area not clearly defined
No mention of account opening minimums, credit score requirements, or membership eligibility criteria
Website does not disclose NCUA insurance coverage details or member protections explicitly
best_for: South Georgia residents seeking relationship-based personal and business banking with local decision-makers
Home buyers interested in mortgage programs including VA, FHA, USDA Rural, or construction financing
Small business owners seeking commercial real estate loans with local market expertise
Members prioritizing digital banking convenience alongside personal loan officer relationships
diagnosis: Southeastern Credit Union is best suited for South Georgia residents and business owners who value relationship-based service and local lending decisions, particularly for mortgage and commercial real estate financing. The primary caveat is that membership eligibility is likely restricted by credit union field-of-membership rules, and specific rates, fees, and lending criteria are not disclosed on the homepage, requiring direct contact to determine qualification and competitiveness.
